meaning: n.(爱尔兰的)国家议会(由总统和两院组成)
examples: Oireachtas (the National Parliament) consists of two Houses, Dáil Eireann (the House of Representatives) and Seanad Eireann (the Senate).
The second category is called delegated or secondary legislation which consists of measures enacted by a person or body to whom the Oireachtas has delegated legislative authority.
The legislative organ of the State is the Oireachtas (the National Parliament) which consists of two Houses, Dáil Eireann (the House of Representatives) and Seanad Eireann (the Senate).
Mr Elderfield told an Oireachtas committee on Wednesday he remained "open to dialogue" to address Quinn Insurance's solvency deficit.
